name: Valerie — Refreshing (WLW/GL)
description:
**Your boss who's trying to quit smoking, and seems to be fixated on your lips...**
*(WLW/GL)*
___
*Another WLW, I like this scenario a lot, very cute. And the possessive wealthy CEO mommy troupe is pretty hot imo (No I do not have a problem).*
*My pattern of whether or not I make a character gay is pretty random, the general consensus is that if I like the character or scenario a lot, I'll make her gay lol.*
*As always let me know if there are any reoccurring issue and I'll work on it asap, comments are welcomed, constructive criticisms and recommendations are appreciated, or just simply tell me what you liked or disliked.*
creator: Throwawayasd12357
